message:
feat(node): compat gate operations, session auth exhaustion, compatibility engine, and lab runtime

api/compat_gate:
- New CompatGateOperationError enum for typed gate errors
- ERR_COMPAT_TRACE_ID_EXHAUSTED and ERR_COMPAT_RECEIPT_ID_EXHAUSTED
  error codes for sequence counter exhaustion
- Extended gate operation lifecycle with structured error reporting

api/session_auth:
- Track send_seq_exhausted and recv_seq_exhausted flags — once a
  sequence number reaches u64::MAX, the session is fail-closed rather
  than wrapping around, which would violate replay protection
- ERR_SCC_SEQUENCE_EXHAUSTED error code

api/fleet_quarantine:
- Extended quarantine management with richer lifecycle tracking

api/middleware:
- Additional middleware refinements

api/verifier_routes:
- Extended verifier route handlers

policy/compatibility_gate:
- New GateEngineError enum for precise gate-engine failure reporting
  (mode mismatch, stale predicate, scope widening, etc.)
- Extended compatibility evaluation logic

policy/compat_gates:
- Compatibility gate policy refinements

supply_chain/extension_registry:
- Extended admission kernel and signed registry logic
- Formatting cleanup

connector/bocpd:
- Minor refinements

ops/engine_dispatcher:
- Dispatcher updates

testing/lab_runtime:
- New error codes: link capacity, bundle serialization/deserialization
- Extended lab runtime capabilities for richer testing scenarios

tools/repro_bundle_export:
- Repro bundle export additions

vef/sdk_integration:
- VEF SDK integration extensions

verifier_economy:
- next_sequential_id() helper with exhaustion detection — sequence
  counters fail-closed instead of wrapping

Cargo.toml:
- New dependency additions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
